finding.description: Malicious service "WinUpdateHelper" installed with ImagePath <HOME>\AppData\Local\Temp\update.dll (AUTO_START), corroborated by SOFTWARE Run key "WindowsUpdateHelper" value rundll32.exe update.dll,DllRegisterServer and timeline entry [7045] service install at 2024-01-15T14:24:02Z

original.description: Three rapid failed logon attempts (Event 4625) for accounts "administrator" and "admin" from 192.168.1.200 at 14:19:01–14:19:07Z, followed by successful network logon (Event 4624, Type 3) for "admin" from same IP at 14:21:33Z with SeDebugPrivilege/SeImpersonatePrivilege/SeTcbPrivilege assigned — indicates credential brute-force leading to privileged access

reason: Confidence 0.61 below threshold 0.75. Corroboration is low — verify with a DIFFERENT tool or data source.
new_approach: Seek additional corroboration from a different tool

reason: DEMONSTRATIVE: integrity violation simulated for judge inspection. See test_security_bypass.py and demo/tamper_demo.py for live triggers.
message: ANALYSIS HALTED — chain of custody broken. All findings voided.
